product_description: BrainPOP Science is an educational technology product designed for middle school students that facilitates learning of scientific concepts through real-world phenomena, investigations, and engineering projects. It provides interactive activities, simulations, and data manipulatives to foster evidence-based thinking and writing, making complex science topics accessible and engaging.

vendor_resources.justification: Official BrainPOP page explicitly titled 'Accessibility Statement' detailing commitment to WCAG 2.1 Level AA and Section 508 standards across their products, including BrainPOP Science.
